title: 'buildah bud --authfile' not work
body:
1. buildah bud can use docker credentials in /root/.docker/config.json
```
# ls /root/.docker/config.json 
/root/.docker/config.json

# buildah bud  .
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/gouyang/httpd
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:e7bb522d92ff6d4e5b2087409b0fc783c2e3b06acf87bee739ee47d90bf02e96
^C
```

2. it fails if remove the docker credentials, it's expected.
```
# cp /root/.docker/config.json /root/auth.json 
cp: overwrite '/root/auth.json'? y
# rm /root/.docker/config.json 
rm: remove regular file '/root/.docker/config.json'? y
# buildah bud  .
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/gouyang/httpd
error building: error creating build container: no such image "docker.io/gouyang/httpd": image not known
```
3. `buildah bud --authfile` is expecting to work, but does not work.
```
[root@bootp-73-3-165 bud]# buildah bud --authfile=/root/auth.json .
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/gouyang/httpd
error building: error creating build container: no such image "docker.io/gouyang/httpd": image not known
```

comments.body: Fixed with #419.  @gouyang please reopen if you find otherwise.
